dialogos.texto_en: Alright, I got here early!
Huh, wait a minute.\nNobody else has arrived yet?
(I thought Uesugi-san would come early.\n I still have some time left,\n so maybe I should go look for him...)
(No, no, that's not a good idea.\n If we miss each other, then again%p-2;――%p;)
...Again?
(Hmm?\n Why did I come to the meeting place so early?)
(I had a feeling that I needed to come early...\n Maybe, because Uesugi-san might come here first.)
Nnnnnhh!
(What's wrong with me?\n I definitely made everyone worried,\n and just thinking about it makes me blush!)
(But, just by Nino and Miku talking to Uesugi-san...)
Hm...
(Nino and Miku are acting weird too.\n I wonder what's going on with them.)
Ah, I feel so frustrated.
What's frustrating you?
UHYAA?!
I-I-Ichika?!\nHow long have you been there?!
I just got here.
I-is that so.\nYou really surprised me.
No one else is here, huh.\nMaybe we came too early.
But, thanks to that,\nI might be able to hear about how frustrated\nyou are, Yotsuba.
Aww...
Is it about Nino and Miku?
I-it's not.\nI just got a little too excited, and tired myself out.\nDon't worry!
Yotsuba?
I guess I can't hide it after all.
Hey, Ichika.\nDid I make Nino and Miku angry?
Nice, nice, good job.\nYou've grown up enough to ask that question, Yotsuba.
Do you understand what's going on, Ichika?\nI don't really get it,\nand it's making me anxious.
Was I acting strange?\nI thought I was just being myself.
That's probably it, right?
Huh?
Nino and Miku aren't really angry.
Is that so?
Hmm, well, maybe they were a LITTLE angry.
That! That's important to know, isn't it?!
But it's okay.\nEven if they were angry, it wasn't serious.
In the end they're still angry though...
After all, once this trip is over,\nFutaro-kun will go to Tokyo.
It's definitely gonna be lonely.\nEveryone feels that way.
Playing with Futaro-kun,\nlaughing and being shouted at by him, it's almost over.\nThe days we're all together are coming to an end.
Yeah...
If you want to change something,\nyou have to do it quickly.
(Maybe...\n are they all worried about me?)
(Oh, I see...)
I understand.\nThank you, Ichika.
I'll do my best not to worry everyone.
That's not it.\nIt's totally FINE to worry everyone.
Huh?\nBut that would become a hassle for all of you...
It's not a hassle.\nAfter all, we're sisters.\nBut, if something happens, of course we'll worry!
Or do you perhaps think\nthat when I worry about myself or everyone else,\nit's a bother, Yotsuba?
No! I don't!
That's right.\nSo you should do whatever you want, Yotsuba.
...Is that okay?
It's okay.\nSometimes you'll make mistakes,\nor bump into things%p-2;――
But, that's how everyone has been progressing\nforward this whole time.
Thank you so much, Ichika.\nFor always being my big sister.
Of course.\nI am the big sister, after all.
Now, all we need is for Futaro-kun to do his best.
